title: Lightly Smoked Irish Lettuce Wraps
description: A savory and light dish featuring lettuce wraps made with smoked flavors for a post-workout meal.

ingredients.name: Minced garlic (fresh or roasted, about 2 cloves)

instructions: Place the lettuce leaves on a baking sheet. If using fresh dill, finely chop it and sprinkle over the lettuce for added freshness.
Mix together olive oil, minced garlic, salt, pepper, and fresh dill in a small bowl. Drizzle this mixture onto each lettuce leaf to lightly coat them evenly.
Top the lettuce leaves with smoked salmon and crumbled feta cheese. Allow them to sit at room temperature for 10 minutes before serving, or keep refrigerated until ready to serve.
Serve immediately as a refreshing snack that's perfect post-workout.
